title: Doomful
description: Mod that reworks Smite and Bane of Arthropods enchantments and expands upon them.
body:
## Installation

Doomful is currently available for 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 Forge. No library mod is required.

## Content

Doomful is a mod that reworks Smite, Bane of Arthropods, and Impaling enchantments. The mod disables those enchantments (can be re-enabled in the 1.20.1 version) and adds artifact and relic items that grant weapons the same functionality. 
Every artifact or relic can be applied to **every weapon.** There are also relics that increase damage against mobs like pigs, illagers, etc.

The mod is also highly configurable.

![Artifacts and Relics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/24DWQidg/images/d8662ca6795983e81193098cd2d8d101cbba6cce.png)
![Applying a Relic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/24DWQidg/images/ff2b6d2ecdf06ad9d326df651711a4be12b32d2f.png)

### How to Obtain Mod Items

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Smithing Templates:** Dungeon loot
- **Artifacts:** Craftable
- **Undead Relic:** Skeleton drop
- **Meaty Relic:** Piglin Brute drop
- **Atrocious Relic:** Blaze and Breeze drop
- **Ominous Relic:** Vindicator drop
- **Relic of Ender:** Shulker drop
- **Submerged Relic:** Elder Guardian drop

</details>

![Bonus: Doom Banner Pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/24DWQidg/images/ae7ec4e5b26047b1708caaad817fca52e79a7b3a.png)

## Compat

- Just Enough Items (JEI)
- Alex's Caves
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- Better Nether
- Better End
